title: HTTP request firing multiple times in workflow
symptom: The HTTP request at the end of the workflow is being triggered 20+ times per second instead of once, causing multiple workflow instances to run.
applies_when: Using an HTTP request node at the end of the workflow
not_this_if: Postgres node is configured to return only one row
Execute only once option is enabled
root_cause: In n8n, each node executes once for every item returned by the previous node. If the Postgres node returns multiple items, the subsequent HTTP request node will send out multiple requests simultaneously, leading to the observed behavior.
fix_steps: Open the settings of the last HTTP request node
Test the workflow to ensure it triggers only once
agent_instruction: Enable the 'Execute only once' option on the last HTTP request node to prevent multiple triggers.
